_comment: Per-project hook registration for the code-review skill's git-push gate. Merge the 'hooks' block below into your project's .claude/settings.local.json. If a 'hooks' block already exists, append the PreToolUse[matcher=Bash] entry to its array. Prerequisites: ~/.claude/skills/code-review symlinked to the agent-skills repo (see the skill's SETUP.md).
